jobPostingInfo.title: Software Engineer Intern
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
About NCR VOYIX

NCR Voyix Corporation (NYSE: VYX) is a global platform-powered leader in unified commerce for shopping and dining. Combining a flexible, intelligent platform with end-to-end payments capabilities and services developed through its deep industry experience, NCR Voyix empowers retailers and restaurants to accelerate new possibilities for their operations, experiences and business outcomes. NCR Voyix is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, and serves customers in more than 35 countries worldwide.

Title: Software Engineer Intern

Why NCR VOYIX?

NCR VOYIX Corporation (NYSE: VYX) is a global technology company transforming everyday transactions into seamless experiences. From retail stores to restaurants, our cloud-based, platform-led SaaS solutions help businesses deliver exceptional customer interactions. With a global presence in over 30 countries, our employees around the world offer a broad perspective and range of skills that enable our customers to make every customer interaction with their business an exceptional experience. Today, NCR Voyix transforms retail stores and restaurant experiences with cloud-based, platform-led SaaS and services capabilities.

Who You Are:

You’re passionate about technology and see the world a little differently than your peers. Everywhere you look, there’s possibility, opportunity, boundaries to push, and challenges to solve.

Benefits

As an intern at NCR Voyix, you’ll gain hands-on experience working with cutting-edge technology alongside industry leaders. You’ll receive mentorship and guidance from experienced professionals, gain exposure to real-world projects, build meaningful connections through networking opportunities, and position yourself for potential future career advancement based on your performance.

What You Will Be Doing:

  • Build high-performing, scalable applications that enable an optimal consumer experience.

  • Participate in an agile development team, implementing user stories with automated testing to verify acceptance criteria

  • Work with Product Managers, Project Managers, Services and Support departments to understand and implement business requirements.

  • Provide accurate estimation of development effort and input into project timelines.

  • Provide development level support for assigned products and projects throughout the development lifecycle.

Requirements

  • Currently enrolled undergraduate student in a relevant technical discipline (e.g., Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Data Science, Information Technology, Machine Learning or Artificial Intelligence)

  • Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail

  • Effective verbal and written communication skills

  • Willingness to learn and adapt to new tools, technologies, and environments.

  • Comfortable working both independently and as part of a team in a dynamic, growth-oriented environment

Location

Internships are onsite, five days a week.

Duration

The NCR VOYIX Intern program runs from mid-late May to late July / early August 2026.

Offers of employment are conditional upon passage of screening criteria applicable to the job

EEO Statement

Integrated into our shared values is NCR Voyix’s commitment to equal employment opportunity. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, age, race, color, creed, religion, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, military service, genetic information, or any other characteristic or conduct protected by law. NCR Voyix is committed to being a globally inclusive company where all people are treated fairly, recognized for their individuality, promoted based on performance and encouraged to strive to reach their full potential. We believe in understanding and respecting differences among all people. Every individual at NCR Voyix has an ongoing responsibility to respect and support a globally diverse environment.

Statement to Third Party Agencies
To ALL recruitment agencies: NCR Voyix only accepts resumes from agencies on the preferred supplier list. Please do not forward resumes to our applicant tracking system, NCR Voyix employees, or any NCR Voyix facility. NCR Voyix is not responsible for any fees or charges associated with unsolicited resumes

“When applying for a job, please make sure to only open emails that you will receive during your application process that come from a @ncrvoyix.com email domain.”
